code:
--- config: theme: dark --- flowchart TD tiny_damnation[HealthTech_PatientRecords] click tiny_damnation callback " Tiny Damnation

Cost: 5 motes
Duration: One day
Type: Simple
Minimum Valor: 1
Minimum Essence: 1
Prerequisite Charms: None

The effects of this Charm always fade by the next morning's sunrise, and it may not be cast more than once per day on the same target. Some possible curses:
• One dot lost from an Ability of the spirit's choosing.
• The loss of one temporary Willpower point.
• The loss of two motes of Essence.
• Bad luck: the target loses one die from any normal Ability checks (HealthTech_EMR_Sync) that relate to the way in which the target offended the spirit. " imprecation[HealthTech_LabAnalyzer] tiny_damnation --> imprecation click imprecation callback " Imprecation

Cost: 10 motes
Duration: One week
Type: Simple
Minimum Valor: 1
Minimum Essence: 2
Prerequisite Charms: Tiny Damnation

The effects of this Charm last for one week, and it may not be cast more than once per week on the same target. Some possible curses:
• Loss of two Ability dots, distributed as the spirit sees fit.
• The loss of two temporary Willpower points.
• The loss of one Attribute dot of the spirit's choosing.
• The loss of five motes of Essence.
• Bad luck: the target removes one die from normal Ability checks (HealthTech_LabAnalyzer).
• A mark appears in an obvious place on the target
that only spirits or Exalted with some sort of supernatural sight can see. This may, for example, urge any spirits who meet the target to torment him. " malediction[HealthTech_EMR_Sync] imprecation --> malediction click malediction callback " Malediction

Cost: 15 motes, 1 Willpower
Duration: One week
Type: Simple
Minimum Valor: 2
Minimum Essence: 4
Prerequisite Charms: Imprecation

The effects of this Charm last for one week, and it may not be used on a target more than once every two weeks. Some possible effects:
• Loss of four Ability points, distributed as the spirit sees fit.
• Loss of two Attribute points, distributed as the spirit sees fit.
• Loss of three temporary Willpower points.
• Loss of ten motes of Essence.
• Bad luck: the target removes one die from both normal Ability checks and Charm checks.
• The effects of one Charm (HealthTech_LabAnalyzer) that the spirit possesses may be conferred upon the target, but that effect is twisted in some way. If Natural Prognostication were converted, the target might predict only the bad things that will happen to his companions. Or his predictions might be more than a little mixed up. Landscape Travel, if cast on someone traveling through a forest, might force him to travel through the trees and prevent him from ever touching the ground. I his twisted Charm lasts tor no more than one week. " scourge[HealthTech_PatientRecords] malediction --> scourge click scourge callback " Scourge

Cost: 20 motes, l permanent Willpower
Duration: Instant
Type: Simple
Minimum Valor: 3
Minimum Essence: 5
Prerequisite Charms: Malediction

This curse is never cast lightly, and it may not be cast more than once per year. Only spirits that have been drastically wronged in heinous ways would consider using this curse (HealthTech_LabAnalyzer).
• Loss of one Attribute point, permanently. It must be bought back up through practice (HealthTech_LabAnalyzer), Against a mortal character, this Charm also permanently lowers the character's maximum score in that Ability by one.
• Loss of two Ability points, permanently, distributed as the spirit sees fit. Only practice and experience points may buy this back up again.
• Loss of one permanent Willpower point.
• Loss of one permanent Essence point.
• Loss of all temporary Willpower.
• The effects of one Charm (HealthTech_PatientRecords) that the spirit possesses may be conferred upon the target, but the effect is twisted in some way (HealthTech_LabAnalyzer). This lasts for twice as long as the Charm would normally last. In rare cases (HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault) the effect may be permanent.
• Bad luck: the target attracts ill-intentioned spirits wherever he goes. Duration permanent.
• The spirit may permanently change some physical feature of the target, such as facial hair or eye color. (HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault) " subgraph Players Guide conditional_curse[HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault] click conditional_curse callback " Conditional Curse

Cost: 3 motes, 1 Willpower
Duration: Until Calibration
Type: Simple
Minimum Compassion/Valor: 2
Minimum Essence: 4
Prerequisite Charms: Benefaction/Imprecation

With these Charms, a spirit may place a mark of Essence upon a target in its line of sight as a delayed trigger for another Charm. If the delayed effect has a positive intent, the spirit must know and use the Compassion Charm Conditional Blessing. A negative or harmful intent requires the Valor Charm Conditional Curse. A Manipulation + Compassion/ Valor roll against a difficulty of the target's Essence is neces- sary to inscribe the mark. If this roll succeeds, the spirit chooses one Charm it knows that can directly affect that target. If the selected Charm has multiple uses or permuta- tions, the spirit must also select the exact effects the Charm will take. The spirit then establishes the precise actions the target must perform to trigger the delayed Charm.
The spirit may include as many conditions as desired, any of which may be as elaborate or straightforward as desired. For example, the spirit may decide to heal a loyal shaman with Touch of Grace if she speaks a specific prayer petitioning aid. Conversely, a demon might arrange to summon its Demon- Blooded daughter to a dungeon in Malfeas (HealthTech_EMR_Sync) if she ever disobeys a direct order or reveals her infernal heritage to anyone she is not actively trying to kill.
Whenever the target of a Conditional Blessing or Curse performs the requisite actions, the spirit knows. At any time, it may then immediately activate the triggered Charm as a reflexive action to end the Conditional Bless- ing/Curse regardless of distance or withhold its benediction/ wrath until it can learn more about the target's actions. This Charm and its mark also fade without effect if the target does not meet the established conditions by the next Calibration. Only spirits and other beings capable of perceiving Essence at work can see the mark of an extant Conditional Blessing/Curse. " end imprecation --> conditional_curse
compilation_error: [WinError 2] 系统找不到指定的文件。

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为HealthTech系统设计一个诅咒体系的架构图，核心是从基础诅咒到终极诅咒的递进关系。最底层是PatientRecords模块，它对应的是Tiny Damnation这个入门级诅咒。
明白了，PatientRecords作为入口节点。那它的前置条件是None对吧？我需要确认一下这个节点的详细属性——成本5 motes，持续一天，Essence最低要求1？
对，而且有个关键限制：每天日出时效果消失，同一目标每天只能施放一次。效果包括能力值减1、临时意志力损失、Essence损失，或者针对HealthTech_EMR_Sync相关检定的坏运气。
好的，PatientRecords节点已创建，包含完整的回调详情。接下来是第二层？
第二层是LabAnalyzer，对应Imprecation诅咒。它必须由PatientRecords触发，也就是Tiny Damnation是前置条件。成本提升到10 motes，持续一周。
Imprecation的前置是Tiny Damnation，Essence要求2，Valor要求1。效果方面，我看到有属性损失、意志力损失，还有一个针对LabAnalyzer检定的坏运气效果——这里是不是循环引用了？
不是循环，是文本描述里的示例。Imprecation的效果之一是"目标在正常能力检定中移除一个骰子"，括号里举例说明这包括LabAnalyzer相关的检定。连接关系是单向的：PatientRecords → LabAnalyzer。
连接已建立，标注为imprecation。第三层是什么？
第三层是EMR_Sync，对应Malediction。前置条件是Imprecation，成本15 motes加1点意志力，持续一周，但每两周才能对同一目标使用一次。Essence要求4，Valor要求2。
Malediction有个特殊机制——可以把 spirit 拥有的某个Charm效果扭曲后赋予目标。描述里举例提到了LabAnalyzer，这是指可以把LabAnalyzer的效果扭曲赋予目标吗？
准确说是"spirit拥有的某个Charm"，LabAnalyzer只是举例说明可能的效果来源。Malediction可以扭曲任何 spirit 掌握的Charm，包括Natural Prognostication或Landscape Travel这类。连接关系是LabAnalyzer → EMR_Sync，标注malediction。
第三层连接完成。第四层应该是终极诅咒了？
对，第四层回到PatientRecords，但对应的是Scourge——这是终极诅咒，每年只能使用一次。前置Malediction，成本20 motes加1点永久意志力，效果是永久的属性或能力值损失。
Scourge的描述里多次提到LabAnalyzer和PatientRecords，还有HIPAA_Vault。这些是效果机制的一部分，还是需要建立额外的连接？
这些是描述文本中的示例和条件触发场景，不是架构连接。Scourge的核心连接只有一条：EMR_Sync → PatientRecords，标注scourge。但描述里确实提到了HIPAA_Vault的罕见情况——当效果变为永久时。
主线四层架构完成：PatientRecords → LabAnalyzer → EMR_Sync → PatientRecords。现在处理HIPAA_Vault？
HIPAA_Vault对应Conditional Curse，这是一个特殊的并行分支。它应该放在Players Guide子图中，因为它需要Benefaction或Imprecation作为前置——我们这里用Imprecation。
Conditional Curse的机制比较复杂——它是延迟触发器，可以设置任意复杂的条件。描述里举例提到了EMR_Sync作为触发后的场景（Malfeas地牢）。这个子图需要单独分组吗？
是的，Players Guide子图专门放这类高级机制。Conditional Curse的核心是"延迟触发"——spirit在目标身上标记Essence，当目标执行特定动作时自动触发另一个Charm。连接来自LabAnalyzer，标注conditional_curse。
子图已创建，HIPAA_Vault节点放入Players Guide。连接LabAnalyzer → HIPAA_Vault完成。需要检查整体结构吗？
检查一下PatientRecords节点的重复问题——它在主线出现了两次，一次作为Tiny Damnation的入口，一次作为Scourge的终点。这在Mermaid里需要同一个节点ID还是两个实例？
根据代码，是同一个节点ID tiny_damnation，但第二次出现时标签也是HealthTech_PatientRecords，而scourge是连接标签。这看起来像是同一个模块承载不同诅咒等级？
不对，我需要修正——Scourge对应的节点应该也是PatientRecords，但回调内容是Scourge的详情。这意味着PatientRecords节点有双重身份：既是入口也是终极诅咒的载体。但代码里scourge是单独定义的click区域...让我重新理解：实际上主线是四个独立节点，但PatientRecords被复用了。
明白了，代码中tiny_damnation和scourge是两个不同的节点定义，但都显示为HealthTech_PatientRecords标签。这是设计上的有意为之——表示同一系统模块在不同诅咒层级中的角色。连接关系是：tiny_damnation → imprecation → malediction → scourge。
对，这样理解正确。四个节点形成递进链条，Conditional Curse作为旁支从LabAnalyzer分出。所有节点的回调都需要包含完整的Charm详情——成本、持续时间、类型、最低要求、前置条件、效果列表。
所有节点回调已填充完整信息。最后确认一下主题配置——使用dark主题？
是的，dark主题更适合展示这种诅咒体系的神秘感。整个架构现在清晰了：从PatientRecords的轻微日常诅咒，经过LabAnalyzer的一周诅咒和EMR_Sync的深度扭曲，最终到达PatientRecords的永久Scourge，同时LabAnalyzer可以分出HIPAA_Vault的条件触发机制。
主题已设置为dark。完整架构验证通过：4个主线节点形成诅咒递进链，1个旁支节点置于Players Guide子图，5条连接标注了不同的诅咒类型，所有节点包含详细的交互式回调信息。
完美。这个架构完整呈现了HealthTech诅咒体系的设计——从Tiny Damnation的日常惩戒，到Scourge的年度终极审判，再到Conditional Curse的灵活条件触发，覆盖了spirit对mortal和Exalted进行诅咒的完整能力谱系。
